positive: A stylized, vintage-inspired illustration of a whimsical deep-sea celestial map. The main subject is a glowing, bioluminescent coral formation integrated with nebulas and constellations. Incorporate stylized silhouettes of deep-sea creatures like anglerfish, manta rays, and jellyfish that appear as cosmic forms. The composition should be perfectly symmetrical and centrally focused, designed for a single print panel. Use an aged parchment texture overlaid with vibrant, contrasting colors: deep midnight blues, glowing cyan, luminous magenta, and antique gold accents. The style must be clean line art mixed with highly saturated, smooth gradient watercolor washes, reminiscent of Art Nouveau meets scientific diagram. Flat composition, strong black lines, central focus, designed for apparel print.
negative: blurry, low contrast, dirty, grunge, text, watermark, logo, signature, cropped, excessive detail, bad anatomy, artifacts, noise, extra limbs, bad composition
